title: phlomis × composita f. almijarensis
intro: Phlomis × composita f. almijarensis is a hybrid species of the Phlomis genus, commonly known as Jerusalem sage or Almerian Phlomis. It is an evergreen shrub native to the Iberian Peninsula, valued for its medicinal and ornamental properties. The plant contains flavonoids and iridoids, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and digestive problems. The leaves and flowers of Phlomis × composita f. almijarensis can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, offering potential health benefits such as antioxidant and antimicrobial effects.
